indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Multiple seating options allow for various group sizes.

indicators.name: natural lighting
indicators.rationale: Large windows provide ample natural light, creating a pleasant atmosphere.

indicators.name: decorative elements
indicators.rationale: Decorative potted plants add a touch of nature and aesthetic appeal.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for casual conversations and hangouts due to its flexible seating arrangement, natural lighting, and decorative elements.
